
---
pagetitle: "Service and professional memberships"
---
:::
## Service

2026 – Present | Past Global Changes (PAGES) - Member of the "Hydroclimate2k" working group [https://pastglobalchanges.org/user/10729](https://pastglobalchanges.org/user/10729){target="_blank"}


2025 – Present | Geogenomic Archaelogy Campus Tübingen (GACT) - Steering committee member [https://geogenarch-tuebingen.de/leibniz-sciencecampus/](https://geogenarch-tuebingen.de/leibniz-sciencecampus/){target="_blank"}


2023–2025 | Leibniz PhD Network - PhD Representative and Coordinator of the Working Group Communication [https://leibniz-phd.net/](https://leibniz-phd.net/){target="_blank"}


2022–2024 | Young Scientists - Local Speaker [www.senckenberg.de/en/career/young- scientists/](www.senckenberg.de/en/career/young- scientists/){target="_blank"}

:::
## Reviewer
Peer reviewer for *Global and Planetary Change*, ISSN: 0921-8181

:::
##Conference Chair
September 2024 | Convener at GeoSaxonia 2024, Dresden, Germany | Session: ’Interactions between mountain building, climate and biodiversity’

---
